sentences.arabic: عَمِلْنَا كَفَرِيقٍ وَاحِدٍ لِإِنْهَاءِ الْمَشْرُوعِ فِي الْوَقْتِ الْمُحَدَّدِ.
sentences.translation: Radili smo kao jedan tim da završimo projekat na vrijeme.
sentences.translationEn: We worked as one team to finish the project on time.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ لِكُلِّ عُضْوٍ فِي الْفَرِيقِ دَوْرٌ مُحَدَّدٌ وَمُهِمٌّ جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Svaki član tima imao je specifičnu i veoma važnu ulogu.
sentences.translationEn: Every member of the team had a specific and very important role.

sentences.arabic: نَاقَشْنَا الْأَفْكَارَ الْجَدِيدَةَ خِلَالَ الِاجْتِمَاعِ الْأُسْبُوعِيِّ لِلشَّرِكَةِ.
sentences.translation: Razgovarali smo o novim idejama tokom sedmičnog sastanka firme.
sentences.translationEn: We discussed new ideas during the company's weekly meeting.

sentences.arabic: التَّعَاوُنُ هُوَ سِرُّ النَّجَاحِ فِي أَيِّ مَشْرُوعٍ مِهْنِيٍّ.
sentences.translation: Saradnja je tajna uspjeha u bilo kojem profesionalnom projektu.
sentences.translationEn: Cooperation is the secret of success in any professional project.
